data.title: DMEGC Solar helps hospital switch to solar energy in China with top 5 solar module ranking.
data.description: In Jinhua, China on January 27, 2026, DMEGC Solar, recognized as a leading global solar module manufacturer ranking in the top 5 by Wood Mackenzie, operates as a listed subsidiary of Hengdian Group, a prominent private entity in China. Notably, DMEGC Solar has provided backing for Hengdian Wenrong Hospital, which stands as the largest facility of its kind.

data.title: Bitwise introducing onchain vaults through Morpho, aiming for 6% APY with over-collateralized lending pools.
data.description: One of the initial strategies is aimed at achieving a 6% annual percentage yield by utilizing over-collateralized lending pools overseen by Bitwise.
Nikkei index ends higher, gaining 0.85%

data.title: UK government awards Anthropic contract to create AI-powered GOV.UK Assistant, starting with employment services, engineers embedded with civil servants.
data.description: The UK company Anthropic has been chosen by DSIT to develop an AI assistant for government services, focusing initially on employment support. The project will involve engineers working closely with civil servants to implement the technology.
Seoul shares end at new high, landing above 5,000, despite Trump's tariff hike threat-yonhap

data.title: 60% of major US banks support Bitcoin - Coinbase CEO noted that majority of bank CEOs he met at Davos forum are pro-crypto.
data.description: The CEO of the cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase, Brian Armstrong, shared that during his attendance at the Davos forum, he found that a majority of the bank CEOs he interacted with showed support for cryptocurrencies.
Modi Says India, EU Agree Trade Pact After Two Decades of Talks

data.title: Tezos launches Tezlink Shadownet for XTZ scaling, enabling smart contracts in a high-scalability environment. XTZ trades at $0.58.
data.description: Tezos has announced the launch of Tezlink Shadownet, which allows Michelson smart contracts to operate in a rollup environment that supports high scalability. During the infrastructure enhancements, the price of XTZ is standing at $0.58 per coin.

data.title: 'Clawdbot' AI assistant's security flaw exposes hundreds of servers, leaking private data including API keys. Experts warn of potential risks.
data.description: Cybersecurity experts are warning about a security flaw in the Clawdbot AI assistant that has compromised hundreds of servers. The vulnerability led to the exposure of sensitive information, including API keys, due to misconfigured proxies. The exact number of affected servers is currently unknown but is estimated to be in the hundreds. This incident underscores the importance of ensuring proper security measures are in place to protect against potential data breaches.

data.title: Valour introduces Bitcoin, Ether ETPs for UK retail investors post FCA ban lift. UK regulators allowing crypto products again.
data.description: As UK regulators reopen the retail market to crypto-related products, global issuers are expanding regulated offerings. This comes as a significant development in the crypto sector, with the UK market witnessing an increase in available crypto products for retail investors. The reopening of the market is accompanied by an expansion of regulated offerings from global issuers, indicating a growing interest and confidence in the sector. This move is expected to provide retail investors with more options and opportunities to invest in crypto assets.

data.title: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA invites investors to its Capital Markets Days on March 2nd and 3rd, 2026.
data.description: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA is pleased to extend an invitation to investors, analysts, and stakeholders for its Capital Markets Days scheduled for March 2nd and 3rd, 2026.

data.title: Stablecoin market decline signals shift to gold as Bitcoin drops by 30%, while gold and silver hit record highs.
data.description: Following a significant market crash in October, Bitcoin has experienced a decrease of approximately 30%. Meanwhile, the prices of gold and silver have surged to reach new record levels.
Western Ukraine’s Lviv region hit by Russian strike on infrastructure, governor confirms

data.title: Ohana Development and Manchester City F.C. team up for multi-billion-dirham project in Abu Dhabi, UAE.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, a collaboration between Ohana Development and Manchester City F.C. has been established through a recent agreement. The agreement outlines plans for a multi-billion-dirham project in the region.

data.title: ProPetro Holding Corp. raised capital through an upsized public offering of common stock in Midland, Texas.
data.description: Midland, TX - ProPetro Holding Corp. disclosed today that they have finalized the pricing for an increased public offering of their common stock. This move comes as they aim to boost their financial standing. The specific number of new shares and the amount raised were not provided.
Citigroup starts coverage on GSK with Neutral rating, sets 1,900p target
Japan and the US eye to invest in synthetic diamond production - Source

data.title: Demand for tokenized gold increases as US dollar weakens; Tether’s XAUt holds over 50% of gold-backed stablecoins.
data.description: The XAUt tokenized gold by Tether has surpassed 50% of the market for gold-backed stablecoins, indicating a growing demand for safe-haven assets due to the weakening US dollar.
Citigroup lifts HSBC price target to 1,370p, up from 1,320p

data.title: TFA Motorsport signs drift icon Daigo Saito for OIDC rounds, aiming to elevate Middle East motorsport.
data.description: In Dubai, the United Arab Emirates, on January 27, 2026, TFA Motorsport, a sports venture, is aiming to boost the developing motorsport scene in the Middle East. The company has revealed a significant agreement for the upcoming competitions in the Oman International Drift Championship (OIDC). This move is part of a broader effort to enhance the presence of drifting globally.
